title: Attack on the Pirik system

The '''attack on the Pirik system''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The Rebel presence on [[Pirik]]'s capital [[Corint City]] was important in times of the Empire: [[Shroud Team]] coordinated [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity on the [[Divis Arm/Legends|Divis Arm]] from there.<ref name="AJ10">{{JournalCite|10|Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)}}</ref> Sometime before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] began an invasion on the [[Pirik system/Legends|Pirik system]].<ref name="AIR-" /> During the attack, Lieutenant [[Ma'w'shiye]] almost lost a leg in jumping through the glass window of [[Strak Tower]]'s 37th floor to escape the Empire.<ref name="AJ4" /> After the battle, Rebel Major [[Norrion Glidamir]] was decorated for her part, and lieutenant [[Ma'w'shiye]] became a living legend for Alliance gunners.<ref name="AIR-" />
